Predictor variables were summarized over fixed non-overlapping 24-hour historical windows using minimum, mean, and maximum statistics and paired with targets defined over the subsequent 24-hour window, forming a supervised learning dataset. The resulting SEP-PRISM Data contains 14,464 labeled samples, including 650 positive operational SEP cases, and is intended to support reproducible benchmarking, model development, feature analysis, and future studies of space weather forecasting.

title: SkillNav：零射击目标导航的分数级技能干预
title_en: SkillNav: Score-Level Skill Intervention for Zero-Shot Object Goal Navigation
content:
## 中文摘要

视觉语言模型（VLM）智能体具有先进的零样本目标目标导航，但单帧推理使它们缺乏具体导航器所需的跨步骤行为意识，从而产生反复出现的故障，例如死胡同失速、室内循环和迂回接近检测到的目标。基于提示的补救措施会增加跨多个子模块情节的代币预算，并且仍然难以编码固有的空间信号，例如角度、地图单元和视点坐标。在本文中，我们提出了 SkillNav，这是一种用于基于 VLM 的导航的可扩展行为技能框架，它将现代 VLM 导航器已经维护的好奇心价值图视为可写基底，可组合技能以零令牌成本在其上刻录行为记忆。技能根据其行为权威级别分为三层，即按比例重新加权的软缩放、区域级保证的下限提升以及阈值触发的强制行动的硬覆盖...

## English Summary

Vision-Language Model (VLM) agents have advanced zero-shot object-goal navigation, yet single-frame reasoning leaves them without the cross-step behavioral awareness an embodied navigator requires, producing recurring failures such as dead-end stalls, in-room loops, and circuitous approaches to detected targets. Prompt-based remedies inflate token budgets across multi-submodule episodes and still struggle to encode inherently spatial signals such as angles, map cells, and viewpoint coordinates. In this paper, we propose SkillNav, an extensible behavioral skill framework for VLM-based navigation that treats the curiosity value map already maintained by modern VLM navigators as a writable substrate on which composable skills inscribe behavioral memory at zero token cost. Skills are stratified into three tiers by their level of behavioral authority, namely soft scaling for proportional reweighting, lower-bound boost for region-level guarantees, and hard override for threshold-triggered forced actions, and cooperate across tiers under a fixed composition order that establishes a predictable, declared priority among skills. This design turns capability improvement into skill registration: new behaviors plug in without retraining the VLM or disturbing existing skills, opening a path for continual refinement. A minimal prompt channel complements the score-level skills with category-level semantic hints, yielding a dual-representation design in which spatial memory lives on the map and semantic memory in short prompts. Training-free, SkillNav establishes new state-of-the-art SPL across MP3D (25.5), HM3D v0.1 (39.3), and HM3D v0.2 (43.2), improving SPL by up to 6.0 absolute over the strongest prior method, and achieves the highest Success Rate on HM3D v0.1 (69.7) and v0.2 (75.9).

title: SLAPBench：四指 SLAP 指纹验证的多模态大语言模型基准测试
title_en: SLAPBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Four-Finger SLAP Fingerprint Verification
content:
## 中文摘要

四指 SLAP 指纹是对一只手的食指、中指、无名指和小指进行平面实时扫描印模，用于边境管制和执法中的身份验证。没有基准评估多模态大语言模型 (MLLM) 是否可以从 SLAP 图像中验证身份。我们推出了 SLAPBench，这是基于 MLLM 的四指 SLAP 指纹验证的第一个基准，由 NIST SD302b 构建，具有 7,832 对（176 个配对，7,656 个非配对）。我们在零样本、任务描述和相似性评分提示下评估了四个开源 MLLM（InternVL3-8B、Qwen2.5-VL-7B、Qwen3-VL-8B、Gemma-3-12B）和专有的 Claude Opus 4.8。   提示...

## English Summary

Four-finger SLAP fingerprints are flat live-scan impressions of the index, middle, ring, and little fingers of one hand, used for identity verification in border control and law enforcement. No benchmark has evaluated whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can verify identity from SLAP images. We introduce SLAPBench, the first benchmark for MLLM-based four-finger SLAP fingerprint verification, built from NIST SD302b with 7,832 pairs (176 mated, 7,656 non-mated). We evaluate four open-source MLLMs (InternVL3-8B, Qwen2.5-VL-7B, Qwen3-VL-8B, Gemma-3-12B) and the proprietary Claude Opus 4.8 under zero-shot, task-description, and similarity-scoring prompts.   Prompting governs verification behavior. Task-description prompting collapses all four open-source models to near-100% False Accept Rate (FAR), and Gemma-3-12B collapses under zero-shot as well; Claude Opus 4.8 alone resists collapse under both binary prompts, giving the best binary result (FAR = 20.2%). Similarity scoring removes collapse across the open-source models and exposes wide capability gaps: Claude reaches AUC = 0.953 and Gemma-3-12B 0.837, while InternVL3-8B is inverted (AUC = 0.590) and Qwen2.5-VL-7B near random (0.567). Qwen3-VL-8B attains perfect separation (AUC = 1.000), which we treat as a diagnostic rather than as capability: SD302b holds one SLAP capture per finger position, so mated pairs are cross-resolution. A matched-resolution control leaves the perfect score intact, ruling out the resolution shortcut; what cannot be excluded within SD302b is near-duplicate detection, since a mated pair is one capture rendered twice. A fairness probe over gender, race, and age suggests disparity grows as discrimination weakens. SLAPBench establishes the first SLAP-specific MLLM baseline and shows that prompting governs collapse while model capability governs discrimination.

title: 黑洞 X 射线双星 Swift J1727.8-1613 中稳定的 X 射线混响滞后
title_en: Stable X-ray reverberation lags in the black hole X-ray binary Swift J1727.8-1613
content:
## 中文摘要

目标。我们研究了黑洞 X 射线双星 Swift J1727.8-1613 在 2023 年爆发期间 X 射线混响滞后的演化，目的是探测跨光谱状态的内部吸积流几何结构。方法。我们分析了涵盖低硬态 (LHS) 和硬中间态 (HIMS) 的 NICER 观测结果。使用基于傅里叶的技术计算时间滞后，并构建滞后频率和滞后能量谱。为了获得软滞后幅度的稳健估计，我们重点关注混响信号占主导地位并保持稳定的频率范围，从而最大限度地减少硬滞后和相位包裹效应的污染。结果。软滞后幅度从 LHS 到早期 HIMS 迅速增加，然后在整个 HIMS 中保持在 10 ms 附近。在混响滞后占优势的频率范围内，滞后几乎不依赖于...

## English Summary

Aims. We investigate the evolution of X-ray reverberation lags in the black hole X-ray binary Swift J1727.8-1613 during its 2023 outburst, with the aim of probing the inner accretion flow geometry across spectral states. Methods. We analyzed NICER observations covering the low-hard state (LHS) and hard-intermediate state (HIMS). The time lags were computed using Fourier-based techniques, and we constructed lag-frequency and lag-energy spectra. To obtain a robust estimate of the soft lag amplitude, we focused on a frequency range in which the reverberation signal dominates and remains stable, thereby minimizing contamination from hard lags and phase-wrapping effects. Results. The soft lag amplitude increases rapidly from the LHS to the early HIMS and then stays near 10 ms throughout the HIMS. In the frequency range in which reverberation lags prevail, the lag shows little dependence on Fourier frequency. On the other hand, the observed low-frequency lags change from hard-lag dominated to soft-lag dominated, with amplitudes comparable to those measured at higher frequencies. Conclusions. These results suggest that the reverberation lag varies little during the HIMS, consistent with a relatively stable inner accretion geometry during this state. The apparent evolution of the lag amplitude from the LHS to the HIMS can be largely explained by the diminishing effect of hard lags and does not necessarily require significant changes in the intrinsic light-travel timescale. Swift J1727.8-1613 therefore provides a case in which the reverberation signal can be studied with reduced contamination over a broad frequency range, offering new insight into the evolution of the accretion geometry in black hole X-ray binaries.

title: 颗粒填料中重力减小和摩擦增强的统计等效性
title_en: Statistical equivalence of reduced gravity and enhanced friction in granular packings
content:
## 中文摘要

使用 X 射线断层扫描，我们将在浮力减少的有效重力下制备的颗粒填料与具有系统变化摩擦力的颗粒的正常重力填料进行比较。我们表明，减小重力会以类似于增加摩擦力的方式降低随机松散堆积极限。在重力减小和摩擦增强的情况下，颗粒填料表现出相同的体积分布、致密性和熵，表明这两种途径都采样了统计上等效的机械稳定状态的爱德华兹体积系综。这种等价源于机械稳定性约束的共同放松：在这两种情况下，需要更少的颗粒参与底层的承载桥结构，从而导致更低的接触数量要求和更高的机械稳定状态密度。然而，减小的重力通过更加各向同性的接触方向保留了明显的接触尺度特征。这些发现将重力确定为控制爱德华兹框架内机械稳定状态的统计可访问性的物理...

## English Summary

Using X-ray tomography, we compare granular packings prepared under buoyancy-reduced effective gravity with normal gravity packings of particles with systematically varied friction. We show that reducing gravity lowers the random loose packing limit in a manner analogous to increasing friction. Granular packings under reduced gravity and with enhanced friction exhibit identical volume distributions, compactivity, and entropy, indicating that both routes sample statistically equivalent Edwards volume ensembles of mechanically stable states. This equivalence originates from a common relaxation of the mechanical stability constraint: under both conditions, fewer particles are required to participate in the underlying load-bearing bridge structures, leading to a lower contact-number requirement and a higher density of mechanically stable states. Nevertheless, reduced gravity retains a distinct contact-scale signature through more isotropic contact orientations. These findings identify gravity as a physical control governing the statistical accessibility of mechanically stable states within the Edwards framework and provide a unified statistical description of granular packings formed through different physical routes.

title: 诚实的仲裁问题：代理基础设施的认知拜占庭容错
title_en: The Honest Quorum Problem: Epistemic Byzantine Fault Tolerance for Agentic Infrastructure
content:
## 中文摘要

状态机复制 (SMR) 和拜占庭容错 (BFT) 共识保证了协议的一致性，尽管任意、串通的错误参与者数量有限。然而，这些保证依赖于该集合之外的参与者正确执行协议的转换语义。代理验证器暴露了较弱的边界：经过身份验证的、响应式的、明确的且符合协议的推理参与者仍可能由于推理错误而认可语义上无效的转换。   我们将这种故障模式称为认知错误，并将这种集体现象称为诚实群体问题（其中“诚实”意味着符合协议，但语义上不正确）。这样的法定人数可以满足普通检查，同时形成无效转换的证书。因此，协议本身并不能保证语义有效性或执行安全性。此外，由于代理验证器通常共享模型权重、训练分布、提示或工具链，因此它们非常容易受到...

## English Summary

State machine replication (SMR) and Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) consensus guarantee agreement despite a bounded number of arbitrary, colluding faulty participants. However, these guarantees rely on participants outside this set correctly executing the protocol's transition semantics. Agentic validators expose a weaker boundary: an authenticated, responsive, non-equivocating, and protocol-compliant reasoning participant may still endorse a semantically invalid transition due to reasoning errors.   We call this failure mode an epistemic fault, and the collective phenomenon the Honest Quorum Problem (where "honest" means protocol-compliant, not semantically correct). Such a quorum can satisfy ordinary checks while forming a certificate for an invalid transition. Thus, agreement alone does not guarantee semantic validity or execution safety. Furthermore, because agentic validators often share model weights, training distributions, prompts, or toolchains, they are highly susceptible to correlated epistemic faults.   We define Epistemic Byzantine Fault Tolerance (EBFT), a fault-tolerance model for agentic infrastructure and post-deterministic distributed systems. EBFT augments the conventional Byzantine fault bound with two separate, confidence-indexed quantities: $e_δ$ bounds coherent invalid endorsements outside the Byzantine set, and $u_ε$ bounds unusable validator support that degrades liveness. These quantities characterize semantic safety risk and liveness degradation independently. We derive quorum-threshold conditions for semantic validity, consensus agreement, liveness, and feasible threshold selection, and outline a calibration methodology for estimating these budgets. We show that adding nominally distinct agents improves fault tolerance only when it measurably reduces the upper-tail concentration of invalid endorsements or unusable support.

title: S-PLUS 第五次数据发布：超过 4500 平方度的南方天空以及长蛇座和 Antlia 星系团的多色视图
title_en: The S-PLUS Fifth Data-Release: Over 4500 square degrees of the Southern Sky and a multicolor view of the Hydra and Antlia galaxy clusters
content:
## 中文摘要

我们发布了南方光度局地宇宙巡天 (S-PLUS) 的第五次数据发布 (DR5)，覆盖 2491 个视场的 4592 平方度。观测是使用 T80-South 进行的，这是一台巴西机器人望远镜，配备了 Javalambre 12 滤光片系统，包含 5 个宽带滤光片和 7 个窄带滤光片。数据产品具有 FITS 图像和广泛的目录，其中包含超过 1.13 亿次检测的通量、幅度和形状参数。此外，还提供了一些增值目录，包括光度红移 (photo-zs)、物体分类、掩模和消光系数。该版本首次覆盖了银河盘上 110 平方度的区域，促进了对银河结构和恒星种群的新研究。该版本还全面覆盖了九头蛇超级星团和许多其他附近...

## English Summary

We present the 5th data release (DR5) of the Southern Photometric Local Universe Survey (S-PLUS), covering 4592 square degrees across 2491 fields. Observations were conducted with the T80-South, a Brazilian robotic telescope equipped with the Javalambre 12-filter system, containing five broad- and seven narrowband filters. Data products feature FITS images and extensive catalogs containing fluxes, magnitudes, and shape parameters for over 113 million detections. In addition, several value-added catalogs are provided, offering photometric redshifts (photo-zs), object classifications, masks, and extinction coefficients. For the first time, this release includes coverage of 110 square degrees along the Galactic disk, facilitating new research into Galactic structure and stellar populations. The release also provides full coverage of the Hydra Supercluster and numerous other nearby clusters with improved data reduction and calibration, enhancing photo-z accuracy, which is vital for large-scale structure studies. A preliminary analysis of the Hydra and Antlia galaxy clusters up to $5 \times R_{200}$ yields an updated catalog of 1706 cluster members based on both spectroscopic and high-quality photo-zs. Our photometric data shows that both clusters have a similar proportion of galaxies with an H$α$ excess relative to their clustercentric distance, though Hydra has a higher fraction near its center. Additionally, the spatial distribution of all objects in our sample highlights a bridge connecting both clusters. We verify that S-PLUS DR5 provides a solid foundation for future scientific investigations, ranging from Solar System studies to Cosmology.

title: 广义斯托克斯方程解的结构及其求解新方法
title_en: The structure of the solution to the generalized Stokes equations and a new method for solving them
content:
## 中文摘要

我们证明了具有二维或三维狄利克雷边界条件的广义斯托克斯方程的解具有特定的结构。也就是说，速度$u$是两个速度场$ω$和$θ$的叠加，$u=ω+θ$，每个速度场都是无散度的并且求解类向量亥姆霍兹方程。这些方程的右侧涉及外力亥姆霍兹分解的旋转分量，以及称为固体压力的调和函数 $q$。同样，流体压力$p$是外力亥姆霍兹分解势$π$与固体压力$q$的叠加，$p=π+q$。事实证明，无论固体压力$q$如何，$ω+θ$都满足广义斯托克斯方程，除了狄利克雷边界条件的法向分量之外。固体压力用自伴强制算子求解线性边界方程，其作用是约束 $ω+θ$ 甚至满足狄利克雷边界条件的法向分量。   从数值角度来看，该方法...

## English Summary

We show that the solution to the generalized Stokes equations with Dirichlet boundary conditions in dimension two or three has a particular structure. Namely, the velocity $u$ is the superposition of two velocity fields $ω$ and $θ$, $u=ω+θ$, each of them being divergence-free and solving vector Helmholtz-like equations. The right hand sides of these equations involve the rotational component of the Helmholtz decomposition of the external force, and a harmonic function $q$, called solid pressure. Similarly, the fluid pressure $p$ is the superposition of the potential $π$ of Helmholtz decomposition of the external force, and of the solid pressure $q$, $p=π+q$. It turns out that regardless the solid pressure $q$, $ω+θ$ satisfies the generalized Stokes equations, except the normal component of the Dirichlet boundary condition. The role of the solid pressure, which solves a linear boundary equation with a self-adjoint coercive operator, is to constrain $ω+θ$ to satisfy even the normal component of the Dirichlet boundary condition.   The method is attractive from the numerical viewpoint. It decouples the velocity from the pressure and does not solve the incompressibility constraint directly. It requires only the solution of Helmholtz-like vector equations coupled on the boundary, and of a boundary equation. In the last section we present two methods for solving numerically the generalized Stokes equations, and some results to demonstrate the efficiency of our approach.

title: 迈向人工神经：机器人仿生光纤触觉传感
title_en: Towards Artificial Nerves: Biomimetic Optical-Fiber Tactile Sensing for Robots
content:
## 中文摘要

机器人系统越来越需要接近人类皮肤的适应性和分辨率的触觉传感，以实现灵巧的操作和安全的交互。 OptiTac 是一种仿生触觉传感器，通过将柔软皮肤上的每个机械针与充当人造神经的光纤配对，模拟人类触摸的机械感受器到神经的结构。该设计展示了一种将触觉信息路由远离传感表面的架构原理，同时保持高空间分辨率，从而为未来机器人系统中的分布式触觉传感建立了一条实用路线。通过将触觉信号视为图像，使用简单的分析方法而不是不透明的深度学习模型来推断接触位置、大小和形状，从而提供可解释和可扩展的触觉智能。这项工作展示了生物学的进化原理如何指导机器人人工神经系统的开发，为下一代机器人平台中的类人触觉感知提供了一条途径。...

## English Summary

Robotic systems increasingly demand tactile sensing that approaches the adaptability and resolution of human skin to enable dexterous manipulation and safe interaction. OptiTac is a biomimetic tactile sensor that emulates the mechanoreceptor-to-nerve architecture of human touch by pairing each mechanical pin on a soft skin with an optical fiber acting as an artificial nerve. This design demonstrates an architectural principle for routing tactile information away from the sensing surface while preserving high spatial resolution, establishing a practical route toward distributed tactile sensing in future robotic systems. By treating tactile signals as images, simple analytical methods, rather than opaque deep-learning models, are used to infer contact location, size, and shape, providing interpretable and scalable tactile intelligence. This work demonstrates how evolutionary principles from biology can guide the development of artificial nerve systems for robots, offering a pathway toward human-like tactile perception in next-generation robotic platforms. More broadly, OptiTac establishes an artificial nerve-inspired sensing framework for interpretable robotic touch and a scalable route toward future distributed tactile systems.

title: 数域上椭圆曲线解析阶矩的上限
title_en: Upper bounds for moments of analytic ranks of elliptic curves over number fields
content:
## 中文摘要

我们证明了数域上椭圆曲线解析秩矩的条件上限。我们还证明了解析等级大于给定界限的椭圆曲线密度的条件界限。

## English Summary

We prove a conditional upper bound for moments of the analytic rank of elliptic curves over number fields. We also prove conditional bounds for the density of elliptic curves with analytic rank larger than a given bound.

title: 视觉语言运动地图：3D 场景地图的开放词汇、不确定性感知、可查询运动属性
title_en: Vision-Language-Motion Maps: An Open-Vocabulary, Uncertainty-Aware, Queryable Motion Attribute for 3D Scene Maps
content:
## 中文摘要

开放词汇 3D 地图让机器人能够回答关于什么和在哪里的语言查询，但它们假设一个静态世界，并且无法回答关于场景元素如何行为的查询。我们引入了视觉语言运动图（VLMM），这是一种开放词汇、可自然语言查询的 3D 地图，其中每个元素都带有融合的运动属性：VLM/LLM 语义可移动性先验与几何观察到的跨帧运动以及每个元素的不确定性相结合。查询简化为属性过滤器，用于区分哪些已看到移动，哪些可以移动但尚未移动，以及哪些保持静止。在具有精确地面事实（AI2-THOR，三种场景类型）的受控模拟器基准上，我们通过消融表明模式字段是不可替代的：即使具有强大的特征，纯语义基线也无法进行运动查询，并且运动场都不能替代...

## English Summary

Open-vocabulary 3D maps let robots answer language queries about what and where, but they assume a static world and cannot answer queries about how scene elements behave. We introduce Vision-Language-Motion Maps (VLMM), an open-vocabulary, natural-language-queryable 3D map in which each element carries a fused motion attribute: a VLM/LLM semantic movability prior combined with geometrically observed cross-frame motion, together with a per-element uncertainty. Queries reduce to attribute filters that distinguish what has been seen to move, what could move but has not, and what stays still. On a controlled simulator benchmark with exact ground truth (AI2-THOR, three scene types) we show through ablation that the schema fields are non-substitutable: a semantic-only baseline fails motion queries even with strong features, and neither motion field substitutes for the other (the prior cannot answer "what is moving," observed motion cannot answer "what could move"). On real dynamic RGB-D (TUM and Bonn, six sequences) we show the uncertainty channel-our key difference from prior fused-motion work-consistently improves moving-vs-static average precision and reduces false motion flags, and is robust to estimated (noisy) poses. The raw confidence is not calibrated, but post-hoc isotonic calibration reaches an expected calibration error of 0.10. VLMM is a representation contribution: the closest prior maps each lack at least one of the four properties-open-vocabulary, language-queryable, fused prior-and-observed motion, and per-element uncertainty-that our combination provides.

title: VTLoc：视觉点云中基于学习的触觉接触定位
title_en: VTLoc: Learning-based Tactile Contact Localization in Visual Point Clouds
content:
## 中文摘要

视觉和触觉是机器人感知和操作所必需的互补模式。视觉提供全局对象上下文，而触摸则提供接触点的精确局部信息。由于需要触觉数据和视觉几何之间的精确空间对齐，集成这些接触定位模式（即预测物体表面上的触摸位置）带来了重大挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 VTLoc，这是一种新颖的视觉触觉框架，它使用 3D 点云作为视觉输入来定位触觉读数中的接触点。 VTLoc 引入了两个关键组件：几何多模态对齐模块，该模块根据融合的视觉-触觉特征重建伪点云，并将其与视觉点云对齐，以强制跨模态的空间一致性；以及迭代定位更新器，它使用融合的视觉-触觉特征迭代地细化预测的接触位置。 VTLoc 根据 100 个现实世界对象...

## English Summary

Vision and touch are complementary modalities essential for robotic perception and manipulation. While vision provides global object context, touch offers precise local information at contact points. Integrating these modalities for contact localization, i.e., predicting the location of touch on an object's surface, poses significant challenges due to the need for accurate spatial alignment between tactile data and visual geometry. To address this challenge, we propose VTLoc, a novel visual-tactile framework that localizes contact points from tactile readings using a 3D point cloud as visual input. VTLoc introduces two key components: a geometric multi-modal alignment module, which reconstructs a pseudo-point cloud from fused visual-tactile features and aligns it with the visual point cloud to enforce spatial consistencies across modalities; and an iterative localizing updater, which iteratively refines the predicted contact location using fused visual-tactile features. Evaluated on a new benchmark of 100 real-world objects, VTLoc improves single-touch contact localization by reducing local-to-global correspondence ambiguity.

title: 蛋白质-配体结合动力学的加速无描述符路径采样
title_en: Accelerated descriptor-free path sampling for protein-ligand binding kinetics
content:
## 中文摘要

蛋白质-配体结合系统的动力学越来越被认为是药物功效的关键决定因素，但仍然比结合亲和力更难计算。现有的动力学方法要么沿着集体变量 (CV) 偏置动力学，要求仔细的系统特定 CV 设计，要么使用路径采样，这保持动力学无偏差，但很难从深自由能井中收敛速率，并且通常依赖于手工设计的描述符。通过结合“两全其美”，我们提出了一种方法，以适度的计算成本和最小的微调来计算一般配体非结合问题的精确动力学，该方法建立在人工智能分子机制发现（AIMMD）路径采样框架的基础上。为了避免特征工程的需要，我们选择使用跨所有系统共享的单个无描述符的等变图神经网络来对提交者进行建模。我们还部分地压平了具有静态、盆地限制的偏置...

## English Summary

The kinetics of protein-ligand binding systems are increasingly recognized as a key determinant of drug efficacy, yet remain far harder to compute than binding affinities. Existing kinetics methods either bias the dynamics along a collective variable (CV), demanding careful system-specific CV design, or use path sampling, which keeps the dynamics unbiased but can struggle to converge rates out of deep free-energy wells and often relies on hand-engineered descriptors. By combining the `best of both worlds', we propose a method to compute accurate kinetics for general ligand-unbinding problems at modest computational expense and minimal fine tuning, building on the AI for Molecular Mechanism Discovery (AIMMD) path sampling framework. To avoid the need for feature engineering, we opt for modelling the committor with a single descriptor-free, equivariant graph neural network shared across all systems. We also partially flatten deep bound-state wells with a static, basin-restricted bias potential. This improves convergence by lifting the path sampling state boundary out of regions, where the committor is hard to learn, while leaving the reactive region strictly unbiased. Across host-guest and protein-ligand systems spanning roughly 17 orders of magnitude in residence time, the method robustly recovers rates in line with reference and experimental values. Simultaneously, and without further sampling, it also reconstructs the underlying unbinding mechanisms. We additionally find that accurate rates do not require globally accurate committor models, allowing for efficient kinetics estimation even in a low-data training regime. Requiring little system-specific setup, our approach offers an efficient and broadly generalizable route to binding kinetics, and its shared committor architecture lays crucial groundwork for probing structure-kinetics relationships across ligand series in drug discovery.

title: AHEAD：通过人类意图预测进行预期的手动远程操作
title_en: AHEAD: Anticipatory Hand-Driven Teleoperation via Human Intent Prediction
content:
## 中文摘要

直接手动驱动的远程操作将操作员的手部运动映射到每一帧的机器人末端执行器命令，从而实现精确控制，但它需要在接近、抓取和放置过程中不断进行监控和校正，这可能会很慢且令人疲劳。对于重复性的拾取和放置任务，监督（基于目标）远程操作简化了此过程：操作员指定目标/路径点，机器人使用规划算法执行运动。然而，这会带来延迟，因为机器人必须等待下一个命令才能计划和行动。 “我们如何才能减少机器人的反应时间，同时降低操作员的工作量？”为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 AHEAD，这是一种实时 VR 远程操作系统，可以预测操作员的意图，从而实现主动的手动控制。在数字孪生中，操作员自然地执行拾取和放置，使用手部动作来传达高...

## English Summary

Direct hand-driven teleoperation maps an operator's hand motion to robot end-effector commands at every frame, enabling precise control, but it requires constant monitoring and correction during approach, grasp, and placement, which can be slow and fatiguing. For repetitive pick-and-place tasks, supervisory (goal-based) teleoperation simplifies this process: the operator specifies goals/waypoints, and the robot executes the motion using planning algorithms. Yet, this introduces latency, as the robot must wait for the next command before it can plan and act. "How can we reduce robot reaction time while lowering operator workload?" To tackle this question, we present AHEAD, a real-time VR teleoperation system that anticipates operator intent to enable proactive, hand-driven control. In a digital twin, the operator performs pick-and-place naturally, using hand motion to convey high-level commands rather than a continuous robot trajectory. AHEAD processes a short window of 3D hand and head signals together with scene context through an attention-based classifier to predict the intended grasp object and placement slot. A state machine converts intent predictions into stable robot goals, enabling early motion while remaining stable under noisy predictions and corrective hand movements. AHEAD's intent prediction module achieves Top1 accuracy: 76% for grasp objects and 76% for target slots. Moreover, our user study shows AHEAD reduces robot reaction latency by 0.6 s (object) and 1.4 s (slot) relative to baselines. Participants also reported lower operator load, indicating faster robot responses while maintaining low operator effort in practice.

title: 在虚拟现实学习环境中使用多模态数据评估学习过程
title_en: Assessing Learning Processes with Multimodal Data in Virtual Reality Learning Environments
content:
## 中文摘要

虚拟现实 (VR) 环境中的学习评估通常依赖于传统的事前内容保留测试，几乎无法揭示这种沉浸式环境中的学习过程。 VR 中玩家活动的多模态数据有望更好地衡量学习过程和高阶技能，但学习科学领域很少有研究探索如何组合这些数据以提供有意义的衡量标准。为了解决这个问题，我们探索了来自 VR 密室逃脱的多模态数据源，其中包含需要解决问题策略和参与言语元认知反射的动手逻辑谜题。我们利用 VR 的功能让用户沉浸在持续的对话中，并促进数字环境中的多模式交互，以了解日志文件和口头数据如何揭示参与者的推理技能与猜测能力。

## English Summary

Assessing learning in virtual reality (VR) environments typically relied on traditional pre-post content retention tests, revealing little about the process of learnng within such immersive environments. Multimodal data from player activity in VR is promising to better measure learning processes and higher-order skills, but little research in the learning sciences has explored how such data can be combined to provide meaningful measures. To address this, we explored multimodal sources of data from a VR escape room containing hands-on logic puzzles that require problem-solving strategies and engagement in verbal metacognitive reflections. We leverage VR's affordances to immerse users in sustained dialog and promote multimodal interactions in a digital environment to understand how logfile and verbal data reveal participants' reasoning skills versus guesswork.

title: 使用社交机器人评估身体虚弱和跌倒风险指标：对老年人的现场评估
title_en: Assessing Physical Frailty and Fall-Risk Indicators with Social Robots: An in situ Evaluation with Older Adults
content:
## 中文摘要

衰弱评估对于评估不良事件的风险以及老年人的健康和社会护理需求至关重要，但其管理仍然需要大量资源，并且通常依赖于粗略的临床结果，例如任务完成时间，这可能会忽视功能衰退的生物力学指标。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个机器人框架，指导老年人进行标准化的虚弱和跌倒风险测试，同时捕获临床评分和其他虚弱相关指标，从而更深入地了解用户的状况。该系统采用行为树架构，协调感知、决策、交互和测量模块。该机器人使用基于视觉的骨骼跟踪来评估已建立的临床测试，包括短期物理性能电池（SPPB）和定时起立（TUG）。该框架是与医疗保健专业人员共同设计的，并在康复中心的研究实验室对 N = 81 名老年人进行了六个月的现场评...

## English Summary

Frailty assessments are crucial to evaluate the risk of adverse events and the health and social care needs of older adults, yet their administration remains resource-intensive and typically relies on coarse clinical outcomes, such as task completion times, which may overlook biomechanical indicators of functional decline. To address this, we present a robotic framework that guides older adults through standardised frailty and fall-risk tests while capturing clinical scores and additional frailty-related metrics, offering a deeper insight into a user's condition. The system uses a Behaviour Tree architecture that coordinates perception, decision-making, interaction, and measurement modules. Using vision-based skeleton tracking, the robot evaluates established clinical tests, including the Short Physical Performance Battery (SPPB) and the Timed Up and Go (TUG). The framework was co-designed with healthcare professionals and evaluated in situ during six months in a rehabilitation centre's research lab with N=81 older adults. Robot-derived measurements were compared against therapist assessments and clinical reference instruments, including a gait analysis walkway and an inertial measurement unit (IMU). Results showed excellent agreement for most test completion times and gait-related parameters ($ICC > 0.9$). And, substantial agreement for the overall SPPB score comparing the robot and the therapist ($k = 0.67$) and moderate agreement comparing the robot and the IMU ($k=0.55$). The findings highlight that social robots can provide reliable and objective frailty assessments in healthcare settings while enabling the collection of relevant mobility indicators beyond conventional outcomes.

title: BODIESReg：使用姿势对齐初始化注册 3D 人体扫描的开源管道
title_en: BODIESReg: An Open-Source Pipeline for Registering 3D Body Scans Using Pose-Aligned Initialization
content:
## 中文摘要

生物力学模型用于量化和优化临床康复、运动科学和职业健康中的人体运动。个性化这些模型需要准确识别解剖标志和身体部位参数，这些参数可以从 3D 体表扫描中得出。将这些表面注册到规范模板对于自动地标检测和模型缩放至关重要。然而，将参数化人体模型拟合到现实世界的 3D 点云仍然具有挑战性：当目标姿势大幅偏离模板的默认姿势时，非线性优化可能会收敛到次优解决方案。我们提出了 BODIESReg，一个开源注册管道，它通过在距离最小化开始之前构建姿势对齐网格来解决这个初始化问题。在自动模式下，BODIESReg 可用于端到端注册，无需用户干预，并批量处理多个扫描。我们在两个互补数据集上评估了 BODIESRe...

## English Summary

Biomechanical models are used to quantify and optimize human movement in clinical rehabilitation, sports science, and occupational health. Personalizing these models requires accurate identification of anatomical landmarks and body segment parameters, which can be derived from 3D body surface scans. Registering these surfaces to a canonical template is essential for automated landmark detection and model scaling. However, fitting parametric body models to real-world 3D point clouds remains challenging: non-linear optimization can converge to suboptimal solutions when target poses deviate substantially from the default pose of a template. We present BODIESReg, an open-source registration pipeline that addresses this initialization problem by constructing a pose-aligned mesh before distance minimization begins. In automatic mode, BODIESReg can be used for end-to-end registration without user intervention and processes multiple scans in batch. We evaluated BODIESReg on two complementary datasets: CHI3D, a synthetic dataset containing complex human poses, and MorphoMotion, a set of real-world 3D optical scans. Automatic registration succeeded for 82.9% of CHI3D scans and for all MorphoMotion scans. Among successful registrations, mean surface-fit error were below 10 mm across both datasets. For cases where automatic initialization fails, we provide interactive tools for manual pose correction and correspondence selection. BODIESReg supports large-scale registration of 3D body scans for biomechanical research.

title: 桥接证据：静态检索实用程序不能预测多步代理搜索中的因果实用程序
title_en: Bridge Evidence: Static Retrieval Utility Does Not Predict Causal Utility in Multi-Step Agentic Search
content:
## 中文摘要

检索系统根据静态有用性概念进行训练和评估：将文档和问题交给读者模型，查看答案是否有所改进，并对文档进行相应评分。当单独阅读文档时，这个想法是成立的。当语言模型充当搜索代理、发出多个查询并轮流进行推理时，它就会崩溃，因为文档的重要性在于它让代理下一步做什么，而不是它对当前问题所说的内容。   我们衡量这一差距而不是争论它。在 HotpotQA 上使用 ReAct 风格的代理，我们重播 1000 个开发问题，并且对于代理读取的每个文档，将其删除并从该点重新运行其余的轨迹。将原始运行与其反事实进行比较，得出来自三个增量的反事实轨迹效用 (CTU) 分数：最终答案质量、下一个查询检索质量和回合数。将 ...

## English Summary

Retrieval systems are trained and evaluated on a static idea of usefulness: hand a document and a question to a reader model, see whether the answer improves, and score the document accordingly. The idea holds up when a document is read on its own. It breaks when a language model works as a search agent, issuing several queries and reasoning across turns, because a document can matter for what it lets the agent do next rather than for what it says about the current question.   We measure that gap rather than argue it. Using a ReAct style agent over HotpotQA, we replay 1000 development questions and, for every document the agent read, delete it and re-run the rest of the trajectory from that point. Comparing the original run against its counterfactual gives a Counterfactual Trajectory Utility (CTU) score from three deltas: final answer quality, next query retrieval quality, and turn count. Crossing CTU against Static RAG Utility (SRU) over 23,322 document observations, the two are close to statistically independent (Spearman rho = -0.026). Roughly a third of the documents the agent reads are causally load bearing while looking useless to a static reader; we call these bridge documents. The pattern survives when the reader based axis is swapped for a BM25 and cross encoder proxy, giving a bridge cell of 27.2% on an evenly spread axis.   A second experiment pins down the mechanism. Using the Observable Entity Relevance (OER) measure from prior work, entities that discriminate relevant from non-relevant candidates appear in the agent's next query 4.02 times more often than entities found only in non-relevant documents (6.1% vs 1.5%, n = 227,139). A bridge document earns its keep by handing the agent a discriminative entity that redirects the search. Static relevance and causal usefulness are different quantities in agentic retrieval, and optimizing the first does not deliver the second.

title: 法学硕士可以根据论文构建 MaxSAT 求解器吗？ CoreForge 体验
title_en: Can LLMs Build a MaxSAT Solver from Papers? The CoreForge Experience
content:
## 中文摘要

我们报告了 CoreForge，这是一种使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 从研究论文而不是现有求解器代码库构建未加权 MaxSAT 求解器的经验。该项目专注于基于不可满足性的 MaxSAT 算法，并遵循迭代工作流程，将论文讨论与 ChatGPT 相结合，通过 Codex 提示实施，以及重复的 LLM 辅助代码审核和修订。尽管代码库实现了多种算法和求解器组件，但我们的评估重点是结合核心引导优化、轻量级预处理、核心最小化、与整数线性优化后端集成以及新的核心序列前瞻方法的配置。   我们的经验表明，法学硕士可以支持论文中的求解器实现，同时需要外部验证、基准测试和人工指导。在我们的实验中，模糊测试和 Ma...

## English Summary

We report on CoreForge, an experience in using large language models (LLMs) to build an unweighted MaxSAT solver from research papers rather than from an existing solver codebase. The project focuses on unsatisfiability-based MaxSAT algorithms and follows an iterative workflow that combines paper discussions with ChatGPT, implementation through Codex prompts, and repeated LLM-assisted code audits and revisions. Although the codebase implements several algorithms and solver components, our evaluation focuses on configurations that combine core-guided optimization, lightweight preprocessing, core minimization, integration with integer linear optimization backends, and a new core-sequence lookahead approach.   Our experience suggests that LLMs can support solver implementation from papers, while requiring external validation, benchmarking, and human guidance. In our experiments, fuzzing and MaxSAT Evaluation instances did not reveal wrong answers in the tested configurations, although performance remains below the best hand-engineered MaxSAT solvers. We summarize what worked, what remained difficult, and the lessons for future LLM-assisted solver development.

title: 随机进化博弈中多态性的出现
title_en: Emergence of polymorphism in stochastic evolutionary games
content:
## 中文摘要

确定性进化博弈论没有区分所有共享混合进化稳定策略的个体的单态群体和以平均再现混合策略的比例存在的纯策略玩家的多态群体。所谓的颤抖手假说假设，在有限的群体中，人口统计噪声会选择单态性，然而，模拟研究在某些情况下发现了矛盾的结果。在这里，我们通过使用时间尺度分离对典型的鹰鸽博弈进行理论分析来解决这个差异。我们描述了随机效应驱动的多态性的出现，在某些条件下发现了持久的多态性状态。

## English Summary

Deterministic evolutionary game theory makes no distinction between a monomorphic population of individuals all of whom share a mixed evolutionarily stable strategy and a polymorphic population of players of pure strategies present in a ratio that reproduces the mixed strategy on average. The so-called trembling hand hypothesis posits that in finite populations demographic noise selects for monomorphism, however, simulation studies have found contradictory results in some situations. Here we resolve this discrepancy by conducting a theoretical analysis of the paradigmatic Hawk-Dove game using timescale separation. We characterise the emergence of polymorphism driven by stochastic effects, finding long-lasting polymorphic states in certain conditions.

title: 使用环境证据估计动态时间扭曲对齐的可靠性
title_en: Estimating the Reliability of Dynamic Time Warping Alignments Using Circumstantial Evidence
content:
## 中文摘要

最近的工作探索了通过使用 DTW 的可微变体（如 Soft-DTW）来处理动态时间扭曲 (DTW) 对齐路径中的不确定性的方法。在本文中，我们以不同的方式处理 DTW 对齐路径的不确定性问题。给定 DTW 对齐路径，我们提出一个度量来指示对齐路径的局部片段的可靠性。我们的指标的直觉是基于间接证据的想法。如果 DTW 找到了一条非常突出的路径，那么如果我们在宽松的边界条件下重新运行对齐，它仍然会选择相同的路径。另一方面，如果 DTW 发现一条“弱”路径，则在宽松的边界条件下重新运行对齐可能会产生不同的路径。因此，我们的可靠性指标是通过选择 DTW 对齐路径的局部部分、重新估计与 FlexDTW ...

## English Summary

Recent works have explored ways to handle uncertainty in dynamic time warping (DTW) alignment paths through the use of differentiable variants of DTW like Soft-DTW. In this paper, we approach the issue of uncertainty in DTW alignment paths in a different way. Given a DTW alignment path, we propose a metric that indicates how reliable a local segment of the alignment path is. The intuition for our metric is based on the idea of circumstantial evidence. If DTW has found a very prominent path, then if we re-run the alignment with relaxed boundary conditions, it will still pick the same path. If, on the other hand, DTW has found a "weak" path, then re-running the alignment with relaxed boundary conditions will likely yield a different path. Accordingly, our reliability metric is computed by picking a local section of the DTW alignment path, re-estimating the alignment with FlexDTW (which allows flexibility in the boundary conditions), and then measuring how well the DTW and FlexDTW paths agree. We assess the proposed reliability metric on DTW alignment paths containing both matching and non-matching regions across a range of scenarios on an audio-audio alignment task. We find that the reliability metric correctly identifies reliable regions of the alignment path with an aggregate AUROC of 0.97. This approach provides an unsupervised method for estimating the reliability of a DTW alignment path.

title: 流动资产不足的家庭：消费对收入变化的反应
title_en: Households with insufficient liquid assets: Consumption responses to income changes
content:
## 中文摘要

流动资产不足的家庭比例对于了解消费对收入变化的反应非常重要。我们利用 2010--2023 年 23 个欧洲国家家庭金融和消费调查的统一数据，调查了糊口 (HtM) 家庭的消费对收入变化的反应，这些家庭分为非 HtM、贫困 HtM 和富裕 HtM。我们的研究结果表明，各国 HtM 家庭的比例存在显着差异，所有国家中的大多数都是富裕家庭，在住房和其他房地产方面拥有大量财富。通过检查这些家庭对假设冲击的边际消费倾向 (MPC)，我们发现贫困的 HtM 家庭表现出最高的 MPC，而富裕的 HtM 家庭则与 MPC 呈负相关。贫困 HtM 家庭的关系似乎是由未观察到的因素驱动的，而与富裕 HtM 家庭...

## English Summary

The fraction of households living with insufficient liquid assets is important to understand consumption responses to income changes. Using harmonized data for 23 European countries over 2010--2023 from the Household Finance and Consumption Survey, we investigate the consumption responses to income changes of hand-to-mouth (HtM) households, grouped into non-HtM, poor HtM and wealthy HtM. Our findings indicate significant variability across countries in the shares of HtM households, with the majority in all countries being wealthy households with sizeable wealth in housing and other real estates. By examining the marginal propensity to consume (MPC) to hypothetical shocks across these households, we find that poor HtM households exhibit the highest MPC, whereas wealthy HtM households display a negative association with the MPC. The relationship for poor HtM households seems to be driven by unobserved factors, whereas the relationship with wealthy HtM is negative and significant even controlling for unobserved preference heterogeneity and households who switch their status. These consumption responses align with life-cycle models with liquidity constraints and precautionary savings.

title: KineFuse：用于手部遮挡物体姿势跟踪的运动学感知触觉融合
title_en: KineFuse: Kinematic-Aware Haptic Fusion for In-Hand Occluded-Object Pose Tracking
content:
## 中文摘要

灵巧的手部操作需要连续的 6D 姿态跟踪，但操作手指不可避免地会遮挡相机中的物体。我们研究如何构建多指手上已有的稀疏触觉信号，包括本体感觉、近端力/扭矩和二元接触，以补充遮挡下预训练的视觉姿势跟踪器。我们提出了一种运动学感知的手指级编码器，并通过三个级别的评估将其与四种替代设计进行系统比较：每帧细化、顺序开环跟踪和闭环操纵。我们的实验表明（i）每帧评估无法区分编码器质量，而顺序跟踪将架构差异放大多达 15 倍； (ii) 结构化编码器学习特定于任务的跨模式门控，专门使用视觉进行平移，并将一个注意力头专门用于旋转触觉，无需明确的监督； (iii) 具有 4 个标记的紧凑手指级标记化优于平面融合和...

## English Summary

Dexterous in-hand manipulation requires continuous 6D pose tracking, yet the manipulating fingers inevitably occlude the object from the camera. We study how to structure the sparse haptic signals already available on multi-fingered hands, including proprioception, proximal force/torque, and binary contact, to complement a pretrained visual pose tracker under occlusion. We propose a kinematic-aware finger-level encoder and systematically compare it against four alternative designs through three levels of evaluation: per-frame refinement, sequential open-loop tracking, and closed-loop manipulation. Our experiments reveal that (i) per-frame evaluation cannot distinguish encoder quality, while sequential tracking amplifies architectural differences by up to 15 times; (ii) the structured encoder learns task-specific cross-modal gating, using vision exclusively for translation and dedicating one attention head to haptics for rotation, without explicit supervision; and (iii) compact finger-level tokenization with 4 tokens outperforms both flat fusion and joint-level representations, which suppress vision through norm dominance. We validate that improved tracking yields higher success in a downstream reorientation task and provide qualitative real-world demonstrations. Our project page is available at https://cold-young.github.io/kine-fuse/.

title: MIRA：将学生与机器人望远镜连接起来的数据管理和教育平台
title_en: MIRA: a data management and education platform connecting students to robotic telescopes
content:
## 中文摘要

望远镜的实践经验通常被用来推动学生参与天文学教育，但扩大对更多学生群体的接触在操作上具有挑战性。因此，学生只遇到专业工作流程的一小部分，很少参与管理现代研究设施的严格同行评审、时间分配流程或自动数据缩减流程。我们展示 MIRA（使用机器人天文学的指导调查）的设计，这是一个数据管理和教育平台，将瑞士中学生和本科生与可操作的机器人天文台连接起来。 MIRA 构建了整个观察生命周期：提案、审核、接受/拒绝、安排和观察。执行后，该平台会自动减少原始 FITS 帧（包括天体测量校准和光度测量），并通过可通过网络访问的存档以及基于 Python 的分析教程为其提供服务。通过 Astra 和 ASCOM A...

## English Summary

Hands-on telescope experience is often used to drive student engagement in astronomy education, but scaling access to larger groups of students is operationally challenging. Consequently, students encounter only a fraction of the professional workflow, rarely engaging with the rigorous peer-review, time-allocation processes, or automated data reduction pipelines that govern modern research facilities. We present the design of MIRA (Mentored Investigations using Robotic Astronomy), a data management and educational platform that connects Swiss secondary school and undergraduate students with operational robotic observatories. MIRA structures the entire observation lifecycle: proposal, review, acceptance/rejection, scheduling, and observation. Following execution, the platform automatically reduces raw FITS frames (including astrometric calibration and photometry) and serves them via a web-accessible archive accompanied by Python-based analysis tutorials. By separating educational front-ends from low-level telescope controls through Astra and ASCOM Alpaca, MIRA delivers an authentic scientific research workflow that bridges classroom learning with professional observatory operations.

title: 关于狄拉克补问题
title_en: On the Dirac complement problem
content:
## 中文摘要

给定狄拉克结构的狄拉克补的存在性是库朗代数体结构理论和狄拉克结构变形理论的核心问题。我们详细研究这个问题，证明拉格朗日补集或局部狄拉克补集的无障碍性，并提供例子来说明这个问题的复杂性。我们引入一个上同调类，它的非零性阻止了狄拉克补的存在，并将其应用于几个例子族。另一方面，通过使用李理论技术，我们证明，对于具有确定形式的李代数 $\mathfrak{g}$，$\mathfrak{g} \oplus \bar{\mathfrak{g}}$ 中的对角线不承认补集，除非 $\mathfrak{g}$ 是交换矩阵。这包括实紧半单李代数及其 Killing 形式。

## English Summary

The existence of a Dirac complement for a given Dirac structure is a central question in the structure theory of Courant algebroids and the deformation theory of Dirac structures. We study this problem in detail, proving the unobstructedness of lagrangian or local Dirac complements and providing examples that show the complexity of this question. We introduce a cohomology class whose nonvanishing prevents the existence of a Dirac complement and apply it to several families of examples. On the other hand, by using Lie-theoretical techniques, we prove that, for a Lie algebra $\mathfrak{g}$ endowed with a definite form, the diagonal in $\mathfrak{g} \oplus \bar{\mathfrak{g}}$ does not admit a complement unless $\mathfrak{g}$ is abelian. This includes real compact semisimple Lie algebras with their Killing form.

title: 未来轻子对撞机 $Z^\prime$ 介导的 $t\bar{t}$ 产生中的量子自旋相关性
title_en: Quantum spin correlations in $Z^\prime$-mediated $t\bar{t}$ production at future lepton colliders
content:
## 中文摘要

我们研究未来轻子对撞机中顶夸克对产生中的量子自旋相关性，其中存在来自标准模型的无异常通用 $U(1)$ 扩展的中性规范玻色子。通过$γ$、$Z$和$Z^\prime$交换及其干扰的自旋密度矩阵，分析了$\ell^+\ell^-\to t\bar t$的过程，其中$\ell=e,μ$。我们关注量子信息可观测量，例如足够的纠缠标记 $\mathcal{D}_{\min}$、并发性、纯度和最大 Clauser-Horne-Shimony-Holt (CHSH) 参数，并将它们的行为与传统的速率信息进行比较。在$U(1)_X$框架内，我们考虑几个代表性的电荷分配来研究不同的手性结构如何影响这些可观察量...

## English Summary

We study quantum spin correlations in top-quark pair production at future lepton colliders in the presence of a neutral gauge boson from anomaly-free general $U(1)$ extensions of the Standard Model. The process $\ell^+\ell^-\to t\bar t$, with $\ell=e,μ$, is analyzed through the spin-density matrix including $γ$, $Z$ and $Z^\prime$ exchange and their interference. We focus on quantum-information observables such as the sufficient entanglement marker $\mathcal{D}_{\min}$, concurrence, purity and the maximal Clauser-Horne-Shimony-Holt (CHSH) parameter, and compare their behavior with conventional rate information. Within the $U(1)_X$ framework, we consider several representative charge assignments to investigate how different chiral structures influence these observables, with particular emphasis on the $Z^\prime$ resonance region and polarized $e^-e^+$ collisions, where the two allowed initial-state helicity configurations can be selectively enhanced. We show that electron-beam polarization provides a direct handle on the left- and right-handed lepton charges of various $U(1)_X$ scenarios. These results demonstrate that quantum spin observables provide information complementary to cross sections and angular distributions in searches for chiral neutral gauge interactions.

title: 适用于软体机器人执行器的坚固硅胶浇注和传感器嵌入程序
title_en: Robust Silicone Pour Casting and Sensor Embedding Procedures for Soft Robotic Actuators
content:
## 中文摘要

软机器人非常适合康复和手术等需要与环境进行适应性和安全交互的应用。然而，软机器人的可重复和可扩展制造的挑战限制了它们在现实世界中的部署。人们已经引入了各种制造方法，但许多方法都是劳动密集型的，并且容易出现人为错误。因此，传统的两部分浇铸仍然是一个有吸引力的选择。本文介绍了使用两部分浇注铸造的坚固、可重复和可扩展的软气动执行器的制造过程。所提出的方法可防止内腔堵塞并确保气密密封。此外，还提出了一种用于薄膜柔性传感器的强大传感器嵌入程序，可以实现准确且可重复的数据采集。对软执行器进行有限元建模 (FEM)，以分析内压载荷产生的应力和变形。进行了PID压力控制的气动实验。自动图像处理用于校准嵌入式弯...

## English Summary

Soft robots are well-suited for applications such as rehabilitation and surgery that require adaptable and safe interaction with their environment. However, the challenges of reproducible and scalable fabrication of soft robots limit their real-world deployment. Various fabrication methods have been introduced, but many are labor-intensive and prone to human error. Therefore, traditional two-part pour casting remains an attractive option. This paper presents procedures for robust, repeatable, and scalable fabrication of soft pneumatic actuators using two-part pour casting. The presented methods prevent internal cavity clogging and ensure air-tight sealing. Additionally, a robust sensor embedding procedure for thin-film flex sensors is presented, which allows for accurate and repeatable data acquisition. Finite Element Modeling (FEM) of the soft actuator is performed to analyze stress and deformation from internal pressure loadings. Pneumatic actuation experiments with PID pressure control are performed. Automated image processing is used to calibrate the embedded flex sensor to bending angle measurements. Staircase and sinusoidal profile actuation experiments validate the performance of the fabricated actuator. Angle response experiments for the staircase input show repeatable performance, and the sinusoidal input shows a small amount of hysteresis consistent with viscoelastic response to pneumatic actuation of soft actuators. Simulated and real-world bending angles show comparable response. These methods provide a repeatable and robust fabrication procedure, validated across two operators and 24 successful fabrications, along with benchmark simulations and experimental testing. These benchmarks will enable more widespread adoption of soft robotics.

title: 投影质量法更严格的暗物质约束：星系群和星系团的神经网络增强方法
title_en: Tighter Dark Matter Constraints from the Projected Mass Method: A Neural Network Enhanced Method for Galaxy Groups and Clusters
content:
## 中文摘要

测量银河系和附近星系群的总质量很困难，因为经典动力学估计依赖于对卫星轨道几何形状的假设，而这些假设在实践中很少满足，而且通常只有少数卫星星系可用作运动学示踪剂。我们提出了一个新的框架，该框架使用在 IllustrisTNG 宇宙学模拟中的数千个模拟星系群上训练的残差神经网络来纠正众所周知的投影质量估计器 (PME)。针对每个卫星样本大小（从 5 颗卫星到最多 50 颗卫星）训练单独的网络，以便校正自动考虑当只有少量示踪剂可用时占主导地位的统计噪声。在模拟光晕的测试中，经典 PME 系统性地高估了光晕质量，其系数为 $M_{\rm proj}/M_{\rm true} = 1.30^{+0.72...

## English Summary

Measuring the total mass of the Milky Way and nearby galaxy groups is difficult because classical dynamical estimators rely on assumptions about satellite orbital geometry that are rarely satisfied in practice, and because only a handful of satellite galaxies are typically available as kinematic tracers. We present a new framework that corrects the well-known Projected Mass Estimator (PME) using a residual neural network trained on thousands of simulated galaxy groups from the IllustrisTNG cosmological simulation. Separate networks are trained for each satellite sample size, from as few as 5 satellites up to 50, so that the correction automatically accounts for the statistical noise that dominates when only a small number of tracers is available. In tests on simulated halos, the classical PME systematically overestimates halo masses by factors of $M_{\rm proj}/M_{\rm true} = 1.30^{+0.72}_{-0.62}$ (using the 2D distance) and $1.46^{+0.97}_{-0.72}$ (using the 3D distance), with RMSE of 0.29 and 0.32 dex respectively. The neural-network correction reduces this to $M_{\rm proj}/M_{\rm true} = 1.02^{+0.30}_{-0.26}$ with an RMSE of 0.13 dex. Applied to the Milky Way, the method yields a total mass of $M_{\rm MW} = 1.144^{+0.399}_{-0.296}\times10^{12}\,M_\odot$, with estimates based on the brightest 5-10 satellites favoring a somewhat lower range of $(0.8$-$0.95)\times10^{12}\,M_\odot$. The modified PME gives a tighter constraint on the virial masses and the dark matter rate prediction in galaxy groups and clusters.

title: VTAP 夹持器：协同指尖感应和视觉触觉主动手掌，实现灵巧的手部操作
title_en: VTAP Gripper: Synergizing Fingertip Sensing and a Visuo-Tactile Active Palm for Dexterous In-Hand Manipulation
content:
## 中文摘要

本文提出了一种触觉反应式抓手，它集成了 Visuo-Tactile Active Palm (VTAP) 和配备触觉阵列传感器的顺应性、可重构手指。该设计利用结构化的指掌协同作用和多模态感知来实现稳健的抓取和精细的操作。驱动的双模式手掌将远程视觉定位与丰富的接触触觉反馈无缝地结合在一起，大大扩展了系统的操纵能力。为了弥合人类手部运动和异构三指结构之间的体现差距，我们进一步提出了一种用于灵巧远程操作的分阶段、手势条件重定向框架。大量实验验证了该系统能够完成一系列具有挑战性的任务：YCB 和易碎物体的反应性抓取、手持注射器重新定向和柱塞驱动、直径小至 3 毫米的簇状物体的单个化以及视觉-触觉钉孔插...

## English Summary

This paper presents a tactile-reactive gripper that integrates a Visuo-Tactile Active Palm (VTAP) and compliant, reconfigurable fingers equipped with tactile array sensors. The design exploits structured finger-palm synergy and multi-modal perception to achieve both robust grasping and fine manipulation. The actuated bi-modal palm seamlessly combines long-range visual localization with contact-rich tactile feedback, substantially extending the system's manipulation capability. To bridge the embodiment gap between human hand motion and the heterogeneous three-finger structure, we further propose a staged, gesture-conditioned retargeting framework for dexterous teleoperation. Extensive experiments validate the system across a range of challenging tasks: reactive grasping of YCB and fragile objects, in-hand syringe reorientation and plunger actuation, singulation of clustered objects down to 3 mm in diameter, and vision-tactile peg-in-hole insertion. Results demonstrate that high manipulation performance can be achieved through coordinated finger-palm interaction and multi-modal sensing, without resorting to high degrees of freedom anthropomorphic designs. The VTAP gripper and its retargeting framework offer a practical reference architecture for dexterous gripper design, manipulation, and contact-rich data collection in support of learning-based approaches. Project webpage: https://yuhochau.github.io/vtap/.

title: 面向手部痉挛评估的绳索-连杆混合驱动外骨骼 CureHand
title_en: Design and Development of a Cable-Linkage Hand Exoskeleton (CureHand) for Assessing Hand Spasticity
source: Heriot-Watt University / University of Edinburgh (EPSRC EP/S023208/1)
content:
## 中文摘要

CureHand 外骨骼采用绳索-连杆混合机械结构，专为**手部痉挛的定量评估**而设计。该装置可精确测量手指关节位置与阻力力矩，结合生物力学与神经学指标建立多层评估体系。在6名参与者上完成了主要手指关节的验证实验。该研究将绳索驱动外骨骼的应用从单纯康复训练拓展到**临床定量评估**领域，为个性化康复方案制定提供了客观数据支撑。

## English Summary

The CureHand exoskeleton uses a cable-linkage mechanical structure specifically designed for **quantitative hand spasticity assessment**. It enables precise measurement of finger joint positions and resistive forces, using a multi-layered assessment approach with biomechanical and neurological metrics. Validated on six participants across primary finger joints, this work extends cable-driven exoskeletons beyond rehabilitation training into **clinical quantitative assessment**, providing objective data for personalized treatment planning.

title: 磁流变绳索驱动可调刚柔混合可穿戴手部康复机器人
title_en: Adjustable Rigid-Soft Wearable Hand Robot with Magnetorheological Cable-Driven Mechanism
content:
## 中文摘要

本文提出一种新型可穿戴手部康复机器人，解决了绳索驱动外骨骼中的两大挑战：佩戴舒适性与力传递效率。创新点包括：（1）**可调刚柔混合锚环**——将硅胶材料与3D打印刚性树脂结合，通过可调旋钮机构适应不同手指尺寸；（2）**磁流变绳索驱动机构**——实现四种功能模式（协调运动、自适应抓握、独立手指控制、机械安全）的无缝切换。该系统已在脑卒中患者上完成抓握辅助和日常生活任务验证，展现了良好的临床应用前景。

## English Summary

This paper proposes a novel wearable hand robot that addresses two major challenges in cable-driven exoskeletons: comfort and force transmission efficiency. Key innovations include: (1) **Adjustable Rigid-Soft Anchor Rings** combining silicone comfort with 3D-printed resin rigidity, featuring an adjustable knob mechanism; (2) **Magnetorheological Cable-Driven Mechanism** enabling four-mode switching between coordinated motion, adaptive grasping, independent finger control, and mechanical safety. The system was validated on stroke patients for grasping assistance and ADL tasks, demonstrating strong clinical potential.

title: 绳索驱动并联机器人用于腕-指一体化康复的可行性研究
title_en: A Feasibility Study for a Cable Driven Parallel Robot for Integrated Wrist and Fingers Rehabilitation
content:
## 中文摘要

本研究首次探索了**绳索驱动并联机器人（CDPR）** 在腕关节和手指一体化康复中的应用。通过建立腕部和手指的运动学模型，采用逆运动学方法进行轨迹规划。原型样机验证表明，该系统在精度和运动范围方面均达到康复训练需求。CDPR 的引入为多关节协调康复提供了全新思路——用一个系统同时服务手腕和手指，避免了传统外骨骼需要多个独立驱动器的问题。

## English Summary

This study explores **Cable-Driven Parallel Robots (CDPRs)** for combined wrist and finger rehabilitation. Kinematic models for both wrist and fingers were developed using an inverse kinematic approach. The prototype demonstrated satisfactory accuracy and range of motion, paving the way for multi-joint coordinated rehabilitation with a single system. The CDPR approach eliminates the need for multiple independent actuators typically required in traditional exoskeletons.

title: 新型绳索支撑手-腕康复机器人：原型设计与验证
title_en: Design and Production of a Novel Cable Supported Hand and Wrist Rehabilitation Robot: Prototype Study
content:
## 中文摘要

本文设计了一款面向家庭和临床环境的便携式手-腕康复机器人。核心创新包括：新型四杆机构结合 Bowden 线缆手指传动系统，支持被动、等长和主动三种训练模式，覆盖屈曲/伸展和桡偏/尺偏运动。采用轻量化电动执行器驱动，已在健康受试者上完成验证，具备良好的临床转化前景。该系统体现了绳索驱动康复机器人向**便携化和家用化**发展的趋势。

## English Summary

This paper presents a versatile, portable rehabilitation robot for both home and clinical environments. Key innovations include a novel four-bar mechanism with Bowden cable finger transmission, supporting passive, isometric, and active exercises for flexion/extension and radial/ulnar deviation. Validated on healthy subjects with lightweight electrical actuators, the system is ready for patient trials, exemplifying the trend toward portable and home-based cable-driven rehabilitation.

title: 基于模型力估计的绳索驱动外骨骼手套：多模态感知与自适应控制
title_en: Model-Based Force Estimation of a Cable-Driven Exoglove with Multimodal Sensing
content:
## 中文摘要

本论文开发了一种软绳索驱动手部外骨骼，实现了**无需触觉传感器的力估计**方法。系统集成三种感知模态：**EMG 肌电信号**用于用户意图检测、**计算机视觉**用于物体识别、**模型驱动力估计**替代传统触觉传感器。采用 Bowden 线缆传输和 3D 打印交叉指形肌腱结构，实测手指力 8.33–11.72 N。多模态以用户为中心的控制策略可在抓握、保持和释放模式间自动切换，目标用户为脑卒中幸存者。

## English Summary

This thesis develops a soft cable-driven hand exoskeleton with model-based force estimation — eliminating the need for tactile sensors. The system integrates three sensing modalities: EMG for user intent detection, computer vision for object recognition, and model-based force estimation replacing tactile sensors. Features Bowden cable transmission with 3D-printed crisscross finger tendons. Measured finger forces of 8.33–11.72 N. Multimodal user-centered control automatically switches between grasping, holding, and releasing modes targeting stroke survivors.

title: 绳索与板簧复合驱动手部康复外骨骼的设计与实验研究
title_en: Design and Experimental Study of a Hand Rehabilitation Exoskeleton Based on Compound Drive of Cable and Leaf Spring
content:
## 中文摘要

针对**脑卒中后手指挛缩期**患者肌肉无力导致手指无法伸展的临床需求，本文提出了一种绳索与板簧复合驱动方案：**高刚度板簧**辅助手指伸展，**绳索**完成屈曲和抓握。性能评估图面积覆盖率达理想外骨骼的70.4%，假手实验验证了多种手势和抓握训练的有效性。复合驱动策略充分利用了绳索在屈曲方向的力优势和弹性元件在伸展方向的储能特性。

## English Summary

Targeting **post-stroke finger contracture** patients where muscle weakness prevents finger extension, this paper proposes a compound drive combining **high-stiffness leaf springs** for extension assistance and **cables** for flexion/grasping. Performance evaluation achieved 70.4% coverage of the ideal exoskeleton workspace. Prosthetic hand experiments validated effectiveness across multiple gestures and grip patterns. The compound strategy exploits the strength of cables in flexion and the energy-storage property of elastic elements in extension.

title: 单方向绳索驱动上肢外骨骼的设计与实验验证
title_en: Design and Experimental Validation of a Unidirectional Cable-Driven Exoskeleton for Upper Limb Rehabilitation
content:
## 中文摘要

本文设计了一套便携式绳索驱动并联外骨骼，集成肘关节、腕关节和手指的康复功能，共 7 个自由度。驱动器置于背包中（1.2–1.5 kg），通过绳索传动实现远端驱动。在 8 名健康受试者上的实验表明，外骨骼辅助下主动肌激活**平均降低 21.3%**。该研究验证了绳索驱动外骨骼在减少肌肉负担方面的有效性，为临床应用奠定了基础。

## English Summary

This paper presents a portable cable-driven parallel exoskeleton integrating elbow, wrist, and finger assistance across 7 DOF, with actuators housed in a backpack (1.2–1.5 kg). Experiments with 8 healthy participants showed an average 21.3% reduction in agonist muscle activation with exoskeleton assistance. The study validates the effectiveness of cable-driven exoskeletons in reducing muscular effort, laying groundwork for clinical application.

title: TIGER 肌腱固定抓握外骨骼机器人对慢性卒中上肢功能的影响：临床研究
title_en: Effects of an Assist-as-Needed Equipped Tenodesis-Induced-Grip Exoskeleton Robot (TIGER) on Upper Limb Function in Patients with Chronic Stroke
content:
## 中文摘要

TIGER 是少数完成**正式临床试验**的绳索驱动手部康复外骨骼之一。这项单臂前瞻性干预研究纳入16名慢性脑卒中患者（平均病程21.7个月），进行为期9周、每周2次的20分钟机器人训练。结果显示：**FMA-UE 总分和子项显著改善**，Box and Blocks 测试和 Motor Activity Log 评分均显著提高。值得注意的是，基线腕/手部 FMA-UE 子评分是预测手功能恢复的最佳指标。该研究为绳索驱动外骨骼的临床有效性提供了重要证据。

## English Summary

TIGER is one of the few cable-driven hand exoskeletons to complete a **formal clinical trial**. This single-arm prospective study enrolled 16 chronic stroke patients (mean 21.7 months post-stroke) for 9 weeks of twice-weekly 20-minute robotic training. Results showed significant improvements in **FMA-UE** total and sub-scores, Box and Blocks Test, and Motor Activity Log. Notably, baseline wrist/hand FMA-UE sub-score was the best predictor of recovery. This study provides critical clinical evidence for cable-driven exoskeleton efficacy.

title: 索驱动腕康复机器人构型设计及运动性能分析
title_en: Configuration Design and Kinematic Performance Analysis of a Cable-Driven Wrist Rehabilitation Robot
source: 清华大学学报(自然科学版)
content:
## 中文摘要

清华大学唐晓强团队提出了一种**3自由度索驱动腕康复机器人（CDWRR）**，采用4根绳索实现腕关节背伸/掌屈、尺偏/桡偏和旋内/旋外三个自由度的康复训练。力控工作空间分析表明，系统满足桡偏/尺偏全范围需求、掌屈/背伸87.7%和旋外/旋内38.7%的ADL运动需求。灵巧性指标范围为1.6~4.0，表明运动灵巧性良好。特别提出了结合**导纳控制的被动柔顺康复训练策略**，当人机交互力矩超过安全阈值时机器人顺应运动，有效避免二次损伤。

## English Summary

The Tang team at Tsinghua University developed a **3-DOF Cable-Driven Wrist Rehabilitation Robot (CDWRR)** using 4 cables for wrist flexion/extension, radial/ulnar deviation, and pronation/supination. The wrench-feasible workspace covers 100% of radial/ulnar deviation, 87.7% of flexion/extension, and 38.7% of pronation/supination ADL demands. The dexterity index (condition number) ranges 1.6–4.0, indicating good manipulability. A **passive compliance training strategy with admittance control** was proposed — when human-robot interaction torque exceeds safety thresholds, the robot complies to prevent secondary injury.

title: 基于扭转绳驱动器的模块化肌腱驱动康复手套分析与开发
title_en: Analysis and Development of the Modular Elements of a Tendon-Actuated Glove for Hand Rehabilitation
content:
## 中文摘要

锡耶纳大学团队提出了基于**扭转绳驱动器（Twisted String Actuators, TSA）** 的模块化肌腱驱动康复手套。TSA通过绳索扭转缩短产生线性运动，具有极高的力传递比和小惯量优势。手套可同时驱动拇指和食指的屈曲/伸展及内收/外展。基于 MATLAB Syngrasp 工具箱建立了手部生物力学参数化模型，并设计了可定制的绳索路径系统。模块化设计使系统可针对不同手指和不同患者需求灵活配置。

## English Summary

The University of Siena team developed a modular tendon-driven rehabilitation glove based on **Twisted String Actuators (TSA)**, which convert motor rotation into linear motion with high force transmission ratio and low inertia. The glove simultaneously drives thumb and index finger flexion/extension and abduction/adduction. A parametric hand biomechanics model was built using the MATLAB Syngrasp toolbox, with customizable cable routing paths. The modular design enables flexible configuration for different fingers and patient needs.

title: 意图控制的欠驱动绳索软体机器人手套外骨骼（SRIG-Exo）的设计与实验验证
title_en: Design and Experimental Validation of an Intention-Controlled Cable-Driven Soft Robotic Glove Exoskeleton (SRIG-Exo) for Assistance and Rehabilitation
content:
## 中文摘要

SRIG-Exo 是一款轻量、可穿戴的**意图控制欠驱动绳索驱动软体机器人手套**。采用可拆卸线缆连接器和线性驱动器（丝杠螺母机构），集成触觉传感器、弯曲传感器和 EMG 意图检测，实现主动辅助控制。最大线缆位移 10 cm，抓握力达 30 N。系统专为手部肌力减弱人群设计，可辅助完成进食、饮水等日常生活活动。该研究代表了绳索驱动康复从被动训练向**主动意图感知辅助**的重要演进。

## English Summary

SRIG-Exo is a lightweight, wearable, underactuated cable-driven soft robotic glove with a detachable cable connector and linear actuator mechanism. It integrates tactile sensors, flex sensors, and EMG-based intent detection for active-controlled assistance. Maximum cable displacement of 10 cm with grasping force up to 30 N. Designed for individuals with weakened hand strength to perform ADLs such as eating and drinking, representing the evolution from passive training to active intention-sensing assistance.

title: 面向上肢康复的绳索驱动外骨骼系统设计与控制
title_en: Design and Control of a Cable-Driven Exoskeleton System for Upper-Extremity Rehabilitation
content:
## 中文摘要

本文设计了一款 3 自由度绳索驱动上肢外骨骼，覆盖肩关节外展/内收、肩关节屈曲/伸展和肘关节屈曲/伸展。系统总重约 1.7 kg，实现了 PID 位置控制和阻抗控制两种策略。在 5 名健康受试者上的测试表明，该系统可提供可控的被动运动辅助，关节轨迹跟踪精度满足康复训练要求。该研究为绳索驱动在**多关节上肢康复**中的应用提供了工程参考。

## English Summary

This paper presents a 3-DOF cable-driven upper-extremity exoskeleton covering shoulder abduction/adduction, shoulder flexion/extension, and elbow flexion/extension. The system weighs ~1.7 kg and implements both PID position control and impedance control. Testing with 5 healthy subjects demonstrated feasible passive motion assistance with controlled joint trajectories, providing an engineering reference for multi-joint upper limb cable-driven rehabilitation.

title: 主动、驱动和辅助：手部与腕部外骨骼的系统性范围综述
title_en: Active, Actuated, and Assistive: A Scoping Review of Exoskeletons for the Hands and Wrists
content:
## 中文摘要

本篇范围综述分析了**135 篇**关于手部和腕部主动驱动外骨骼的研究论文。核心发现：在技术就绪度 TRL 3（概念验证）级别的设备中，**47% 采用了绳索管路机构**（含 Bowden 线缆）。这些设备主要用于手部支持，平均 2–3 个自由度。该综述全面梳理了从刚性连杆到软体绳索的驱动技术演进路线，是了解该领域整体格局的必读文献。

## English Summary

This scoping review analyzed **135 research papers** on active, actuated assistive devices for hands and wrists. Key finding: 47% of TRL 3 (proof-of-concept) devices used cable conduit mechanisms (including Bowden cables), primarily for hand support with 2–3 DOF on average. The review comprehensively maps the evolution from rigid linkages to soft cable-driven actuation, making it essential reading for understanding the field's landscape.

title: 面向脑卒中康复的绳索驱动手部外骨骼初步测试
title_en: Initial Testing of a Cable-Driven Hand Exoskeleton for Stroke Rehabilitation
content:
## 中文摘要

本文介绍了一款专为脑卒中康复设计的绳索驱动手部外骨骼，仅需**两个电机**驱动四指（拇指独立），手部组件仅重 **246 克**。绳索机构避开手掌侧，使患者可直接接触真实物体。通过 ANOVA 分析（F = 57.2, p < 0.001）验证了高重复性，56 秒内完成穿戴。健康受试者测试无疲劳或不适报告，已获准进入脑卒中患者临床试验阶段。该研究为绳索驱动外骨骼从实验室走向临床提供了重要的**安全性和可靠性数据**。

## English Summary

This paper presents a cable-driven hand exoskeleton for stroke rehabilitation that actuates all four fingers together with only two motors, weighing just 246 g on the hand. The cable mechanism avoids the palmar side, allowing interaction with real objects. High repeatability was confirmed via ANOVA (F = 57.2, p < 0.001), with setup time of ~56 seconds. No fatigue or discomfort was reported by healthy participants. Cleared for clinical trials with stroke subjects, this study provides critical safety and reliability data for cable-driven exoskeletons.

title: 集成表面肌电传感的软体康复手套：欠驱动绳索系统的设计与控制
title_en: Soft Robotic Glove with Integrated sEMG Sensing for Disabled People with Hand Paralysis
source: IEEE Transactions on Neural Systems and Rehabilitation Engineering
content:
## 中文摘要

本文开发了一款集成 sEMG 传感的轻量级软体康复手套，**手套本体仅重 50 克**。系统采用欠驱动绳索机构，将 sEMG 电极直接集成到手套中，实现比例控制方法，并结合**镜像治疗**策略进行康复训练。最大抓握力达 35 N，可无需主动控制自适应抓握多种形状物体。该研究为低成本、轻量化的家用绳索驱动康复手套提供了重要设计参考。

## English Summary

This paper developed a lightweight soft robotic glove with integrated sEMG sensing, weighing only 50 g. The system uses an underactuated cable mechanism with sEMG electrodes embedded in the glove, implementing proportional control combined with Mirror Therapy for rehabilitation. Maximum grasp force of 35 N, capable of handling objects of various shapes without active control. This work provides important design reference for low-cost, lightweight home-use cable-driven rehabilitation gloves.

title: 软体封装便携式康复手套：实现闭环精细运动技能训练
title_en: A Soft-Packaged and Portable Rehabilitation Glove Capable of Closed-Loop Fine Motor Skills
content:
## 中文摘要

发表于 **Nature Machine Intelligence** 的重磅研究，提出了一种软体封装便携式康复手套，能实现**闭环精细运动技能训练**。该手套采用创新的软体封装技术将驱动、传感和控制集成于一体，突破了传统康复设备笨重、仅能进行粗大运动训练的局限。通过闭环控制策略，手套可以实时感知手指位置和力，实现精准的抓握力调节。该研究将绳索/软体驱动的手部康复推向了**顶级学术期刊**的关注焦点。

## English Summary

A landmark study published in **Nature Machine Intelligence** presenting a soft-packaged portable rehabilitation glove capable of closed-loop fine motor skills training. The glove integrates actuation, sensing, and control through innovative soft packaging technology, overcoming the limitations of bulky traditional devices restricted to gross motor training. Closed-loop control enables real-time finger position and force sensing for precise grip force modulation. This work elevated cable/soft-driven hand rehabilitation to the attention of top-tier academic journals.

title: 可穿戴绳索驱动肩部外骨骼服（CDSE）的设计与开发
title_en: Design and Development of a Wearable Cable-Driven Shoulder Exosuit (CDSE)
content:
## 中文摘要

本文设计了一款采用 **Bowden 线缆机构**的可穿戴绳索驱动肩部外骨骼服（CDSE），用于多自由度上肢辅助。系统总重约 2 kg，最大辅助负载 4 kg。与传统刚性外骨骼不同，CDSE 采用柔性纺织基底配合绳索传动，大幅提升了穿戴舒适性。该研究代表了绳索驱动从手部向**整个上肢链条**（肩-肘-腕-手）扩展的趋势，为全上肢协调康复提供了技术基础。

## English Summary

This paper presents a wearable cable-driven shoulder exosuit (CDSE) using Bowden cable mechanisms for multi-DOF upper limb assistance. The system weighs ~2 kg and supports loads up to 4 kg. Unlike traditional rigid exoskeletons, CDSE uses a soft textile base with cable transmission, significantly improving wearing comfort. This work represents the expansion of cable-driven rehabilitation from the hand to the entire upper limb chain (shoulder-elbow-wrist-hand), providing a technical foundation for coordinated full-arm rehabilitation.
